sections.paragraph:
fut. יִטְבֹּל to dip, to dip in, to immerse, followed by an acc. of the thing, and בְּ before the liquid, Gen 37:31 Lev 9:9 Deu 33:24 Job 9:31 Rth 2:14 also without an acc. Exo 12:22 2Ki 8:15. Intrans. to immerse oneself. 2Ki 5:14, “he went down וַיִּטְבֹּל בַּיַּרְדֵּן שֶׁבַע פְּעָמִים and dipped himself in the Jordan seven times.” (Chald. טָבַל, Arab. طمل id.)

Niphal, pass. Jos 3:15.

Hence טְבוּלִים and-
